headline: Stop losing slow—execute catch-up pace today
summary: You're losing 0.34 kg weekly but need 0.62; every day of discipline closes your 345-day deficit.
details: Stick to Huel-portioned meals and whole plants today—zero emotional snacking, max 7,500 kJ intake. Get 30 minutes on the rowing machine before work starts, no excuses. You're 345 days behind; today's discipline directly compounds toward 88 kg by next June, no shortcuts.
